entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A potential energy crop known for high biomass productivity and low input

entities.name: BIOMASS PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The capacity of a crop to produce a large amount of biomass

entities.name: BIOMASS YIELD
entities.description: The total biomass produced, determined by plant height and maturity

entities.name: HEIGHT
entities.description: A physical trait of sorghum used to define biomass yield and targeted for genetic improvement

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: A developmental trait of sorghum used to define biomass yield and targeted for genetic improvement

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: The application of molecular tools for the genetic improvement of crop traits

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple sequence repeat markers used to identify genetic links to height and maturity

entities.name: POOL-BASED ASSOCIATION MAPPING
entities.description: A technique used to identify markers linked to specific traits using pooled samples

entities.name: SORGHUM MINI CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative set of sorghum accessions used for phenotypic and genotypic evaluation

entities.name: FIVE ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: The diverse environmental conditions across which the sorghum mini core collection was tested

entities.name: POST-RAINY SEASONS
entities.description: Specific seasonal conditions used to evaluate and select maturing accessions

entities.name: INDIVIDUAL GENOTYPING
entities.description: A method used to confirm polymorphic markers

entities.name: ASSOCIATION MAPPING
entities.description: A method used to identify markers associated with specific traits like height and maturity

entities.name: CHROMOSOMES 6, 9, AND 10
entities.description: Genomic locations where markers for height and maturity are clustered

entities.name: QTLS
entities.description: Quantitative trait loci associated with height and maturity

entities.name: MA1
entities.description: A recently cloned gene located near markers associated with height and maturity

relationships.description: used to select accessions based on
